codeReview.summary: This is a verification-only feature with no code changes. The feature's purpose was to run the full test suite, integration test, and QEMU visual verification after all pixel optimizations were applied. The feature is marked completed by worker session 44e507ac-d206-4cbd-af2e-31840190aada. No code diff exists for this feature (correct — it's verification only). The scrutiny validator independently confirms the verification claims: all 1555 tests pass (cargo test -- --test-threads=1 exits 0), build succeeds (cargo build --release exits 0), and formatting is clean (cargo +nightly fmt -- --check exits 0). The VAL-CROSS-001 through VAL-CROSS-006 assertions cover end-to-end keystroke rendering, clock updates, test pass, integration test, visual rendering, and rapid typing. The scrutiny validator has independently verified VAL-CROSS-003 (all tests pass) and VAL-CROSS-004 will be verified by the user-testing validator. Visual verification (VAL-CROSS-001, -002, -005, -006) is deferred to the user-testing-validator which will run QEMU screenshots.
